title: Apple
text: Apples are edible fruits that are often round and can be red, green, or yellow. They are commonly eaten fresh or used in desserts.

title: Traffic light
text: A traffic light is a signaling device used at road intersections and crossings. Red means stop, green means go, and yellow usually warns that the signal is changing.

title: Bicycle
text: A bicycle is a human-powered vehicle with two wheels, pedals, handlebars, and a frame. It is often used for transport, exercise, or recreation.
